display.name: Sunken Toll Fire
display.short_description: A toll ring has sunk into the mud until only the blackened stones show above the track. Someone banked the coals before they left.

choices.label: Warm yourself by the coals
choices.summary: The heat is mean and smoky, but it still puts a little strength back into your shoulders.

choices.label: Sweep the ring for salvage
choices.summary: A fitted rim lining turns up under the ash where the toll keeper hid it against damp.
